performance.evidence: All 106 project tests completed in 0.642 seconds; profile operations are local and synchronous. No project-specific performance threshold exists.

reliability.evidence: Atomic metadata replacement, corrupt-state rejection, cleanup after failed creation, retry-safe deletion, duplicate preservation, and missing-credential behavior are covered offline.

operability.evidence: CLI help and invalid-input behavior passed; list/show expose safe state; unavailable keyrings and deferred auth kinds produce actionable pre-network failures.

coverage.evidence: Measured line coverage is 91.48% overall and 96.39% across provider-profile business modules, exceeding the 80% and 95% release thresholds.

traceability.evidence: e01s01 has 100% explicit story coverage, all ten acceptance criteria map to executable tests, and the heuristic link ratio is 0.0.
